label: Observation
description: Measured values from surveys or reports

label: Event
description: Policies product launches market entries milestones

label: Impact Link
description: Modeled relationships between events and indicators

label: Access
description: Account ownership and availability of financial services

label: Usage
description: Active use of digital payments and financial services

label: Product Launch
description: New financial product or service launch

label: Market Entry
description: New operator or institution entering market

label: Milestone
description: Significant observed behavioral or market milestone

label: Operator Report
description: Data from telecom or financial service operator

label: Regulatory Report
description: Central bank or government statistical report

label: Medium
description: Estimated or derived from secondary sources

label: Account Ownership Rate
description: Share of adults 15+ with any financial account

label: Mobile Money Account
description: Share of adults with mobile money account

label: M-Pesa Users
description: Registered M-Pesa Ethiopia users in millions

label: Digital Payment Adoption
description: Share of adults making/receiving digital payments

label: P2P Transfer Value
description: Total P2P digital transfer value (ETB billions)

label: Mobile Penetration
description: SIM connections as share of population

label: Access Target 2025
description: NFIS-II interim account ownership target for 2025

label: Access Target 2030
description: NFIS-II final account ownership target for 2030
